1. ### Wes [Riven] _—_ 9/24/24, 3:45 PM
    
    Riven paces the room looking for hints of where Xamanthe might have been taken. The broken vases and the bodies of the soul eaters add a gloom to the dusty area. He kneels down and examines the floor and picks up faint marks that indicate a hoof. "It's this way." The group moves through the doors, up the stairs and into the large ritual like room. After spending a few minutes there, under the gaze of the stone skeletal watchers, a chill runs up his spine. "What terrible deeds were wrought here? Why do they have Xamanthe? And where are the other Varnholders?" He says it almost to himself as he tries to work out his thoughts, but loud enough that the group hears in the quiet sepulchral dark.
    
2. @Darren [Pavel] @Slava [Astor] @Jon [Lucas] @Tom [Lee] @Billy [Milo] @Danny
    
3. Wes [Riven] changed the channel name: **9. In the sepulchral chamber** _—_ 9/24/24, 3:46 PM
    
4. ### Wes [Riven] _—_ 9/24/24, 4:21 PM
    
    _Riven searching for tracks and meaning under the gaze of the harbringers of death._
    
    
    
    ![Image](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1288028429555466260/1288037662875193366/messenger-of-death.webp?ex=6a1ddbcd&is=6a1c8a4d&hm=a656df968191b0c802cfe315be9d166eaa001c627b2d3ba5db03cf13a987fdd0&=&format=webp&width=546&height=546)![](data:image/png;base64,)

5. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ 9/26/24, 10:11 AM
    
    Pavel paces the chamber restlessly, looking for clues to the future from the evidence of the past. He's searched the room for traps and not found any, but deep down, his intuition is telling him that he overlooked something. "Does blood burn? These empty lamps by the statues look like they have a residue of blood in them."
    
6. ### Wes [Riven] _—_ 9/28/24, 4:57 AM
    
    Riven sniffs the air. "I don't smell anything now." Riven looks uneasy. "Did they offer profane sacrifices here?" he says motioning to the altar.
    
7. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ 9/28/24, 5:16 AM
    
    "I think that's a safe bet." Pavel grimaces. "I don't know what the lamps do if you pour blood into them, but I'm not going to sacrifice anyone to find out."
    
8. ### Slava [Astor] [FROG],  _—_ 9/28/24, 6:51 AM
    
    **"Now, just because a ritual might take blood doesn't mean it needs all of someone's blood. Sometimes a drop will do. "** _Benedin falls into pedagogy, sharing a tip that most novice ritualists aren't aware of._ **"But engaging dark forces is dangerous, no matter how small the price might seem. It might not even cause us harm, but empowering Charon or his agents could certainly endanger someone else, somewhere else."**
    
9. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ 9/28/24, 7:18 AM
    
    "Maybe the lamps only need enough blood to form a connection between Charon and the blood's owner. Maybe just enough to -- hypothetically -- turn an ordinary Varnnholder mage into a flying, undead, unholy version of himself?" Pavel shudders. "No thank you. Godly magic is bad enough, but at least with the gods, you're offering yourself up to servitude voluntarily. I want no part of whatever magic's going on here."
    
10. ### Wes [Riven] _—_ 9/28/24, 8:02 AM
    
    Riven looks over at Pavel and nods his agreement.
    
11. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ 10/3/24, 5:19 AM
    
    With an agreement to leave the vessels of unholy sacrifice alone, Riven and Pavel take turns listening one last time at the doors leading out of the room, between the skeletal statues. Riven hears faint noises from the other side, so the rest of the party lines up behind them, weapons out and spells ready. They’re strong. They’re resolved. They feel ready to tackle anything. _Vordekai’s never seen anything like us_, thinks Pavel with grim satisfaction. He throws open the door 

BOOM
